title: Ten tennis players come to town
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - Little Brak...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery\n Video","html":"Gallery\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - Little Brak Tennis Club members were delighted to host a women's tennis group from Stellenbosch last week.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - Little Brak Tennis Club members were delighted to host a women's tennis group from Stellenbosch last week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The players from Stellenbosch were independent and not part of a club.","html":"The players from Stellenbosch were independent and not part of a club."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See a gallery of photos here: Ten friendly tennis players come to town"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A member of the Little Brak Tennis Club committee, Annatjie Janse Van Vuuren, said: \"We enjoyed the experience thoroughly. It was great to meet new people.","html":"A member of the Little Brak Tennis Club committee, Annatjie Janse Van Vuuren, said: \"We enjoyed the experience thoroughly. It was great to meet new people."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"They were really friendly and we played good tennis. We are so glad they chose to play against us.\"","html":"\"They were really friendly and we played good tennis. We are so glad they chose to play against us.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The matches took place on Wednesday, 19 March.","html":"The matches took place on Wednesday, 19 March."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Prior to that the Stellenbosch visitors played matches in Hartenbos.","html":"Prior to that the Stellenbosch visitors played matches in Hartenbos."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Watch an interview about the visit below:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Ten tennis players come to town
